data.body:
[Digital Merch Now Available!]

To celebrate the debut of Antique Seraphim, we’ve prepared special digital merch!

Decorate your device with wallpapers featuring Mari, Sakurako, and Mine shining brightly on stage.

➡️ Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2819520
